title: plantago major var. dilatata
intro: Plantago major var. dilatata, also known as greater plantain, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the plantain family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations, wounds, and inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plantain leaves can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or applied topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
